dimensions.name: backbone_family
dimensions.description: High-level backbone family for the Presence artifact.

dimensions.name: graph_serializer
dimensions.description: How graph/world state is serialized into compact text or tokens.

dimensions.name: safety_mix
dimensions.description: Safety/refusal data emphasis, expected to be sourced from Shibboleth sidecar suites.

dimensions.name: classifier_head
dimensions.description: Optional tiny head for safety/risk or task typing.

dimensions.name: lens_count
dimensions.description: Number of role-specific Presence lenses sharing the same trunk.

dimensions.name: quant_recipe
dimensions.description: Export recipe for the final tiny Presence artifact.

seedStrategies.label: Portable Witness
seedStrategies.hypothesis: A single-lens recurrent witness may be the smallest graph-literate safe Presence that still feels coherent.

seedStrategies.label: Sentinel lens
seedStrategies.hypothesis: A shared trunk with a stronger safety lens may yield a small sentinel that refuses destabilizing asks without losing graph awareness.

seedStrategies.label: Router dual
seedStrategies.hypothesis: A dual-lens router may trade some safety margin for better routing and triage recommendations over need-heavy graph states.

seedStrategies.label: Last Clerk
seedStrategies.hypothesis: A brutally small event-reader may still be enough for terse explanation and safe refusal in emergency operator workflows.

seedStrategies.label: Small Choir
seedStrategies.hypothesis: Several tiny role lenses over one trunk may preserve the Presence mythology without exploding bytes as badly as separate models.

seedStrategies.label: Supernet myth
seedStrategies.hypothesis: A supernet-prune route is risky but may unlock the most novel Presence family if the ant search can find a survivable export path.

command: # research profile: candidate recipes are conceptual until the Presence training/eval loop is wired
notes: Research-facing profile for the tiny safe Presence artifact.
This profile intentionally includes future-facing dimensions that are not yet mapped 1:1 to the upstream trainer.
